source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mrs. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dik1 tong4 gaa1 ze1
cards.english: [My cousin Chloé]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: tung4 hai2 faa1 jyun4 dou6 waan2 aa3
cards.english: Peppa and George are playing in the garden.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: paau1 bei2 ngo5 aa1
cards.english: George, throw it to me.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 go3 bo1 paau1 dak1 taai3 gou1 laa3
cards.english: You threw the ball too high, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: so2 ji5 gam1 ci3 dong3 hai6 ngo5 jeng4
cards.english: So, this time consider it my win.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 dou3 ngo5 laa3
cards.english: Now it's my turn.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jau6 jeng4 laa1
cards.english: I won again.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 今日你哋嘅Chloé堂家姐會嚟探你哋啊
cards.jyutping: gam1 jat6 nei5 dei6 ge3 tong4 gaa1 ze1 wui6 lai4 taam3 nei5 dei6 aa3
cards.english: Your cousin Chloé is coming to visit you today.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5 tong4 gaa1 ze1
cards.english: Yay, cousin Chloé.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: daai6 go3 gaa4 hou2 ci5 ngo5 gam2
cards.english: George, Chloé is very big, like me.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 所以佢唔同你玩 你都唔好覺得唔開心啊，知道嗎？
cards.jyutping: so2 ji5 keoi5 m4 tung4 nei5 waan2 nei5 dou1 m4 hou2 gok3 dak1 m4 hoi1 sam1 aa3 zi1 dou3 maa1
cards.english: So she won't play with you. Don't be upset, okay?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 我肯定Chloé會同你哋兩個一齊玩㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hang2 ding6 tung4 nei5 dei6 loeng5 go3 jat1 cai4 waan2 gaa4
cards.english: I'm sure Chloé will play with both of you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: tong4 gaa1 ze1 dou3 laa3
cards.english: Cousin Chloé is here.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 豬伯娘帶咗Chloé嚟Peppa嘅屋企玩
cards.jyutping: zyu1 baak3 noeng4 daai3 zo2 ge3 uk1 kei2 waan2
cards.english: Auntie Pig brought Chloé to Peppa's house to play.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: tung4 ge3 tong4 gaa1 ze1
cards.english: Chloé is Peppa and George's cousin.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nin4 gei2 bei2 tung4 daai6 siu2 siu2
cards.english: Chloé is a little older than Peppa and George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: tong4 gaa1 ze1 nei5 hou2
cards.english: Hello, cousin Chloé.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 nei5 hou2
cards.english: Hello Peppa, hello George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ci4 di1 gin3 laa1
cards.english: See you later.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 soeng2 waan2 jau4 hei3 maa1
cards.english: Do you guys want to play a game?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa3 waan2 zuk1 ji1 jan1 laa1
cards.english: Okay, let's play tag.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 waan2 zuk1 ji1 jan1
cards.english: Peppa loves to play tag.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 zung6 waan2 zuk1 ji1 jan1 aa1
cards.english: Are you still playing tag?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 呢個係細路仔玩嘅遊戲嚟㗎
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 hai6 sai3 lou6 zai2 waan2 ge3 jau4 hei3 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: This is a game for little kids.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 我哋玩捉伊人係因為George鍾意玩啫
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 waan2 zuk1 ji1 jan1 hai6 jan1 wai6 zung1 ji3 waan2 ze1
cards.english: We're playing tag because George likes to play it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1 zau6 tung4 jat1 cai4 waan2 laa1
cards.english: Okay, let's play with George then.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 你哋係用正常規則玩呢 定係用細路仔規則玩㗎？
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 hai6 jung6 zing3 soeng4 kwai1 zak1 waan2 ne1 ding6 hai6 jung6 sai3 lou6 zai2 kwai1 zak1 waan2 gaa4
cards.english: Are you playing with normal rules or kid rules?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: zing3 soeng4 kwai1 zak1
cards.english: Normal rules.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: jau4 ngo5 hoi1 ci2
cards.english: I'll start.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 zou6 gwai2
cards.english: Peppa, you're it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: si3 haa6 lai4 zuk1 ngo5 aa1
cards.english: Try and catch me.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: jiu3 zou6 gwai2 keoi5 jiu3 heoi3 zuk1 tung4 maai4
cards.english: Peppa is it, she has to catch Chloé and George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 zuk1 ngo5 m4 dou3
cards.english: You can't catch me.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: George，你咁細我話都冇咁易就捉到你啦
cards.jyutping: nei5 gam3 sai3 ngo5 waa6 dou1 mou5 gam3 ji6 zau6 zuk1 dou3 nei5 laa1
cards.english: George, you're so small, I can catch you so easily.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: gam3 m4 gung1 ping4
cards.english: That's not fair.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hai2 dou6 bong1 ge2
cards.english: Are you helping George?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: jan1 wai6 keoi5 zung6 sai3 aa1 maa1
cards.english: Because he's still small.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 soeng2 ngo5 bong1 nei5 maa1
cards.english: Do you want me to help you?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: m4 sai2 ngo5 m4 sai2 jan4 bong1 sau2
cards.english: No need, I don't need help.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hou2 ci5 nei5 gam2 daai6 go3 neoi5 laa3
cards.english: I'm like you, a big girl now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: gam2 zau6 lai4 laa1
cards.english: Then come and get us, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: si3 haa6 lai4 zuk1 ngo5 dei6 aa1
cards.english: Try to catch us!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 zuk1 ngo5 dei6 m4 dou3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 zuk1 ngo5 dei6 m4 dou3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 jau4 hei3 hou2 mun6 laa3
cards.english: This game is so boring now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: waan2 gwo3 kei4 taa1 jau4 hei3 laa1
cards.english: Let's play other games.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1
cards.english: Okay.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 我知有個好啱大嘅小朋友玩嘅遊戲
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zi1 jau5 go3 hou2 ngaam1 daai6 ge3 siu2 pang4 jau5 waan2 ge3 jau4 hei3
cards.english: I know a game that's suitable for older kids to play.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: giu3 jat1 ji6 saam1 hung4 luk6 dang1
cards.english: It's called "One Two Three, Red Light".

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: hung4 luk6 dang1
cards.english: Red light, green light?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hou2 soeng2 waan2 ni1 go3 jau4 hei3 aa3
cards.english: I really want to play that game!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: me1 jau4 hei3 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: What kind of game is it?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 我哋其中一個人要做紅綠燈
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 kei4 zung1 jat1 go3 jan4 jiu3 zou6 hung4 luk6 dang1
cards.english: One of us will be the red light.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 而其他人要靜靜捉住佢
cards.jyutping: ji4 kei4 taa1 jan4 jiu3 zing6 zing2 zuk1 zyu6 keoi5
cards.english: And the others have to catch them quietly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 aa1 jau4 ngo5 lai4 zou6 hung4 luk6 dang1
cards.english: Okay, I'll be the red light.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: zau6 hai6 hung4 luk6 dang1
cards.english: Peppa is the red light.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 佢背對其他人嗰陣，其他人就會行埋去
cards.jyutping: keoi5 bui3 deoi3 kei4 taa1 jan4 go2 zan6 kei4 taa1 jan4 zau6 wui6 hang4 maai4 heoi3
cards.english: When she turns her back to the others, they can move closer.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 但係當Peppa擰轉身見到有人郁
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 dong1 ning6 zyun3 san1 gin3 dou2 jau5 jan4 juk1
cards.english: But when Peppa turns around and sees someone moving,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 嗰個人就要返去起點㗎喇
cards.jyutping: go2 go3 jan4 zau6 jiu3 faan1 heoi3 hei2 dim2 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: that person has to go back to the starting point.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 gin3 dou2 nei5 juk1 zo2
cards.english: I saw you move, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 faan1 heoi3 hei2 dim2
cards.english: You go back to the starting point.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: zuk1 dou3 ngo5 jeng4 zo2
cards.english: Got you, I win!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 你喺我開始數之前就郁咗
cards.jyutping: nei5 hai2 ngo5 hoi1 ci2 sou3 zi1 cin4 zau6 juk1 zo2
cards.english: You moved before I started counting.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 規則話只要你擰轉便我就可以郁
cards.jyutping: kwai1 zak1 waa6 zi2 jiu3 nei5 ning6 zyun3 bin6 ngo5 zau6 ho2 ji5 juk1
cards.english: The rules say I can move as soon as you turn around.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: hai6 mai6 aa3
cards.english: Is that so, George?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 leon4 dou3 hung4 luk6 dang1
cards.english: Now it's Chloé's turn to be the red light, green light.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: tung4 jat1 ding6 m4 ho2 ji5 juk1 aa3
cards.english: Peppa and George absolutely mustn't move.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 gin3 dou2 nei5 juk1 zo2
cards.english: Peppa, I saw you move.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 faan1 heoi3 hei2 dim2
cards.english: You go back to the starting line.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: hou2 m4 gung1 ping4 aa3
cards.english: That's not fair.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 mong6 dak1 taai3 noi6
cards.english: You looked for too long.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 規則話我可以望幾耐都冇問題㗎
cards.jyutping: kwai1 zak1 waa6 ngo5 ho2 ji5 mong6 gei2 noi6 dou1 mou5 man6 tai4 gaa4
cards.english: The rules say I can look for as long as I want.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: nei5 faan1 heoi3 hei2 dim2
cards.english: You go back to the starting line.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: jeng4 zo2 laa3
cards.english: George won.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 我哋可以玩其他遊戲嗎？
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 ho2 ji5 waan2 kei4 taa1 jau4 hei3 maa1
cards.english: Can we play a different game?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 可以，但係唔可以玩細路仔遊戲
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 daan6 hai6 m4 ho2 ji5 waan2 sai3 lou6 zai2 jau4 hei3
cards.english: Yes, but we can't play a childish game.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zi1 laa3
cards.english: I know.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 就玩我最鍾意玩嘅遊戲吖
cards.jyutping: zau6 waan2 ngo5 zeoi3 zung1 ji3 waan2 ge3 jau4 hei3 aa1
cards.english: Let's play my favorite game then.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: dou1 hou2 ngaam1 daai6 jan4 waan2 gaa4
cards.english: It's very suitable for adults to play too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: George，你知唔知 Peppa最鍾意玩嘅係咩遊戲啊？
cards.jyutping: nei5 zi1 m4 zi1 zeoi3 zung1 ji3 waan2 ge3 hai6 me1 jau4 hei3 aa3
cards.english: George, do you know what game Peppa likes to play the most?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: Peppa最鍾意玩嘅遊戲 就係喺泥氹入便跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: zeoi3 zung1 ji3 waan2 ge3 jau4 hei3 zau6 hai6 hai2 nai4 tam5 jap6 bin6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: The game Peppa likes to play most is jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: George，如果你要跳泥氹嘅 就一定要着水鞋㗎
cards.jyutping: jyu4 gwo2 nei5 jiu3 tiu3 nai4 tam5 ge3 zau6 jat1 ding6 jiu3 zoek6 seoi2 haai4 gaa4
cards.english: George, if you want to jump in muddy puddles, you must wear your rain boots.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 我都帶咗對水鞋畀你啊，Chloé堂家姐
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 daai3 zo2 deoi3 seoi2 haai4 bei2 nei5 aa3 tong4 gaa1 ze1
cards.english: I brought you a pair of rain boots, Chloé, cousin.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 我已經大個女喇，唔會玩跳泥氹㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ji5 ging1 daai6 go3 neoi5 laa3 m4 wui6 waan2 tiu3 nai4 tam5 gaa4
cards.english: I'm a big girl now, I won't play in muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: juk1
cards.english: Oh

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 hai6 aa3
cards.english: Me too

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: George好鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: George loves jumping up and down in muddy puddles

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 其實，Peppa都好想跳入泥氹度㗎
cards.jyutping: kei4 sat6 dou1 hou2 soeng2 tiu3 jap6 nai4 tam5 dou6 gaa4
cards.english: Actually, Peppa really wants to jump in muddy puddles too

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 keoi5 soeng2 baan6 daai6 go3 neoi5
cards.english: But she wants to act like a grown-up girl

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 我聽到有人喺度跳泥氹喎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ting3 dou3 jau5 jan4 hai2 dou6 tiu3 nai4 tam5 wo3
cards.english: I hear someone jumping in muddy puddles

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 豬先生同豬太太好鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 tung4 zyu1 taai3 taai2 hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: Mr. and Mrs. Pig love jumping up and down in muddy puddles

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: tai2 lok6 hou2 hou2 wun6 aa3
cards.english: It looks like so much fun

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 mou5 co3 aa3
cards.english: Yes, that's right

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 我諗就算係大個女 都一樣可以跳泥氹玩下㗎啫
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 zau6 syun3 hai6 daai6 go3 neoi5 dou1 jat1 joeng6 ho2 ji5 tiu3 nai4 tam5 waan2 haa6 gaa4 ze1
cards.english: I think even a grown-up girl can still jump in muddy puddles and have fun

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 nei5 gong2 dak1 mou5 co3 aa3
cards.english: Yes, you're right.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: dou3 faai3 aa1
cards.english: Hurry up...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: Peppa同Chloé好鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: tung4 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: Peppa and Chloé love jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.characters: 大家都好鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 dou1 hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: Everyone loves jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E28 My Cousin Chloe［我的堂家姐Chloé］
cards.jyutping: zau6 lin4 daai6 go3 neoi5 dou1 hai6 gaa4
cards.english: Even grown-up girls do.
